channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Extreme Heat and Wet Bulb Globe Temperature Disrupt Play at the 2026 French Open
item.description: The 2026 French Open has been marked not only by early upsets but also by dangerous heat conditions affecting players and on-court staff. During the first week of the tournament at Roland Garros, mult...

item.title: Canada prepares for upcoming CUSMA review as Carney and Trump maintain regular contact
item.description: Industry Minister Mélanie Joly says Prime Minister Mark Carney has been in frequent communication with U.S. President Donald Trump as Canada prepares for the upcoming review of the Canada-United State...

item.title: Weather Alert: Rain and Strong Winds Expected in Several Kenyan Counties
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department has issued a 24-hour weather alert warning Kenyans to prepare for rainfall, thunderstorms, and strong winds across several regions. The alert, valid from 9pm on Thu...

item.title: Potential Challenges for a New ‘Teal’ Political Party in Australia
item.description: Recent political developments in Australia suggest that the rise of One Nation is reshaping the conservative landscape, while discussions emerge around the potential creation of a new ‘teal’ party in ...

item.title: Former Trump aide criticizes DOJ investigation of E. Jean Carroll as politically damaging ahead of elections
item.description: A former aide to President Donald Trump has publicly questioned the political wisdom of a recent Department of Justice decision involving E. Jean Carroll, arguing that it could be counterproductive fo...

item.title: An Editorial Cartoon Critiques the Repetition and Decline of Trump’s Political Promises
item.description: This opinion piece by Pulitzer Prize-winning editorial cartoonist Nick Anderson presents a critical perspective on former President Donald Trump’s recurring political messaging. Through commentary and...

item.title: Utumishi Girls fire survivor recounts escaping dormitory blaze that killed 16 students
item.description: A survivor of the deadly fire at Utumishi Girls Academy has emotionally shared her experience of escaping the dormitory inferno that claimed the lives of 16 students and left 79 others injured. The st...

item.title: Urdu poet Bashir Badr passes away at 91; leaves behind rich literary legacy
item.description: Acclaimed Urdu poet and Padma Shri awardee Bashir Badr has passed away in Bhopal at the age of 91, as confirmed by his family. Born in 1935 in Ayodhya, Uttar Pradesh, Badr developed an early interest ...

item.title: Advocate says systemic failures in New Brunswick child protection contributed to youth overdose death
item.description: A child and youth advocate in New Brunswick says the province’s child protection system failed to provide adequate support to a young person who later died from a drug overdose. The case has renewed c...

item.title: Tanzania Film Officials Complete China Training to Strengthen Tourism Promotion Through Digital Media
item.description: Tanzania is expecting to strengthen its tourism and film promotion efforts after officials from the Tanzania Film Board completed an international training programme in China focused on film productio...

item.title: Inquest hears details of fatal River Nene car crash involving five teenagers
item.description: An inquest has heard details of a tragic incident in which two teenagers died after a car carrying five young people plunged into the River Nene in Cambridgeshire and became fully submerged. The crash...

item.title: Marcus Questions the Leadership of NLEA in Episode 39 of Blood vs Duty
item.description: Sa Episode 39 ng teleseryeng “Blood vs Duty,” mas tumindi ang tensyon sa loob ng NLEA matapos maglabas ng saloobin si Marcus laban sa kanilang mga opisyal. Ipinakita sa episode ang kanyang pagkadismay...

item.title: Ontario Man Lists Pirate Ship for Sale After Years of Loan Struggles
item.description: An Ontario resident is making headlines for attempting to sell a pirate ship he owns, after years of struggling to repay a relatively small loan of $4,500. The unusual sale has captured attention for ...

item.title: Princess Andre begins presenting role on This Morning as family faces public scrutiny
item.description: Princess Andre, aged 19, made her debut as a presenter on ITV's This Morning, co-hosting a fashion segment alongside Craig Doyle and Angela Scanlon. She assisted three young girls in selecting prom dr...

item.title: Bafana Bafana named 26-man 2026 World Cup squad with renewed ambition and optimism
item.description: South Africa’s national football team, Bafana Bafana, has announced its final 26-man squad for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, sparking renewed excitement and cautious optimism across the country. Head coach...

item.title: Dadu Records Extreme Heat as Temperatures Soar Above 50C
item.description: The Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD) has reported that Dadu, in Sindh, recorded an unprecedented high temperature of 51.5°C on Thursday, marking a new maximum temperature record for the city. ...

item.title: House impeachment prosecutor rejects remote voting, urges full physical presence in Senate trial
item.description: House impeachment prosecutor Lordan Suan has expressed his opposition to allowing remote participation or online voting in the upcoming Senate impeachment trial, stressing that proceedings of such imp...

item.title: Suzana Magufuli, Mother of Former President, Dies in Chato
item.description: Geita – Suzana Magufuli, mama wa marehemu John Pombe Magufuli, aliyekuwa Rais wa tano wa Tanzania, amefariki dunia jana usiku saa 7:40 mchana kwenye nyumba yake Chato, Geita Region. Rais Samia Suluhu ...

item.title: Dowry Deaths in India: Why Women Remain Trapped in Abusive Marriages Despite Warning Signs
item.description: This article highlights the sad reality of dowry deaths in India through recent cases like Twisha Sharma, Deepika Nagar, and others. These women allegedly faced continuous harassment for more dowry ev...

item.title: Acer launches Swift Spin 14 AI convertible with 120 Hz display and Snapdragon X-series processors
item.description: Acer has introduced the Swift Spin 14 AI, a new compact convertible laptop designed for versatility, performance, and portability. The device features a 14-inch 16:10 IPS touchscreen with a resolution...
